_correction.reason: Corrected document attribute name from sprk_name to sprk_documentname per discovered schema. The repo file already correctly used sprk_document (custom entity) — but used the wrong attribute name. Also added the matter-owner-eq-userid + record-owner-eq-userid additional branches to widen the membership union, mirroring the deployed PB-018 pattern.
_correction.alsoFixed: sprk_name -> sprk_documentname; widened FetchXml union with matter/record-owner branches

playbook.name: New Documents on Your Matters
playbook.description: Identifies documents added to user's matters since the last check (configurable time window) and creates notifications for each new document.

timeWindow.label: From
timeWindow.description: Look back window for new document detection

configJson.description: Scoped to the current user's matters (resolved via LookupUserMembership node)

Resolve the executing user's matter memberships (owner + assigned attorney + assigned paralegal) per ADR-034. Resolved IDs are bound to `myMatters.ids` for downstream filtering via {{joinIds myMatters.ids}}.

configJson.fetchXml: <fetch top="50"><entity name="sprk_document"><attribute name="sprk_documentname"/><attribute name="sprk_filename"/><attribute name="createdon"/><attribute name="sprk_documentid"/><attribute name="sprk_matter"/><attribute name="ownerid"/><link-entity name="sprk_matter" from="sprk_matterid" to="sprk_matter" link-type="outer" alias="m"><attribute name="sprk_mattername"/><attribute name="sprk_matternumber"/><attribute name="ownerid"/></link-entity><filter type="and"><condition attribute="createdon" operator="last-x-hours" value="{{timeWindowHours}}"/><condition attribute="createdby" operator="ne-userid"/><filter type="or"><condition attribute="sprk_matter" operator="in" value="{{joinIds myMatters.ids}}"/><condition entityname="m" attribute="ownerid" operator="eq-userid"/><condition attribute="ownerid" operator="eq-userid"/></filter></filter><order attribute="createdon" descending="true"/></entity></fetch>
configJson.description: New sprk_document records (createdby != current user, createdon in last {{timeWindowHours}}, default 24h) where EITHER (a) sprk_matter is in the user's myMatters.ids membership set [LookupUserMembership branch], OR (b) the document owner is the current user, OR (c) the related sprk_matter owner is the current user. Outer link so docs without matter linkage still match on ownerid. Note attribute is sprk_documentname (NOT sprk_name).
Check if any new documents were found on user's matters
